name: Wowie Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the cake mix, pudding, sour cream, eggs and oil.
2. Using an electric mixer, beat the batter for 8 to 10 minutes.
3. Grease and flour a 10 inch tube pan.
4. Pour one-quarter of the batter into the pan and sprinkle half of the chocolate chips and walnuts over it.
5. Pour in the remaining batter and top with the remaining chocolate chips and nuts.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 50 to 60 minutes.
7. Cool for about 10 minutes, then turn out onto a serving plate and cool completely.
